meta.description: Oracle 到华为 GaussDB 迁移兼容性规则集 — GaussDB 提供 Oracle 兼容模式，大部分 PL/SQL 可直接迁移
meta.author: DMA Team

rules.name: NVL → NVL
rules.description: GaussDB 在 Oracle 兼容模式下直接支持 NVL 函数

rules.name: DECODE → DECODE
rules.description: GaussDB 兼容 DECODE 函数

rules.name: SYSDATE → SYSDATE
rules.description: GaussDB 兼容 SYSDATE 函数

rules.name: TO_CHAR → TO_CHAR
rules.description: GaussDB 兼容 TO_CHAR 但格式码有差异，Oracle 'YYYY' → GaussDB 'YYYY' 相同，但部分格式码不同

rules.name: TO_DATE → TO_DATE
rules.description: GaussDB 兼容 TO_DATE，但日期格式码需确认兼容性

rules.name: WM_CONCAT → WM_CONCAT/LISTAGG
rules.description: GaussDB 兼容 WM_CONCAT，也可使用 LISTAGG

rules.name: LISTAGG → LISTAGG
rules.description: GaussDB 兼容 LISTAGG 聚合函数
rules.exampleSqlSource: SELECT LISTAGG(name, ',') WITHIN GROUP (ORDER BY name) FROM users;
rules.exampleSqlTarget: SELECT LISTAGG(name, ',') WITHIN GROUP (ORDER BY name) FROM users;

rules.name: CONNECT BY → CONNECT BY/递归CTE
rules.description: GaussDB 兼容 CONNECT BY 层次查询（Oracle 兼容模式），但也可用 WITH RECURSIVE
rules.exampleSqlSource: SELECT * FROM tree START WITH pid IS NULL CONNECT BY PRIOR id=pid;
rules.exampleSqlTarget: SELECT * FROM tree START WITH pid IS NULL CONNECT BY PRIOR id=pid;

rules.name: ROWNUM → ROWNUM/LIMIT
rules.description: GaussDB 兼容 ROWNUM 伪列，也可用 LIMIT/OFFSET 替代

rules.name: 序列 NEXTVAL/CURRVAL → NEXTVAL
rules.description: GaussDB 序列使用 nextval() 函数，Oracle 兼容模式下也支持 .NEXTVAL

rules.name: MERGE INTO → MERGE INTO
rules.description: GaussDB 支持 MERGE INTO，但部分高级子句需调整
rules.exampleSqlSource: MERGE INTO t USING dual ON (t.id=1) WHEN MATCHED THEN UPDATE SET name='A';
rules.exampleSqlTarget: MERGE INTO t USING dual ON (t.id=1) WHEN MATCHED THEN UPDATE SET name='A';

rules.name: DUAL → DUAL
rules.description: GaussDB Oracle 兼容模式提供 DUAL 表

rules.name: Hint → GaussDB Hint
rules.description: GaussDB 支持部分 Oracle Hint，但语法和名称差异大，建议逐一验证或移除

rules.name: VARCHAR2 → VARCHAR2
rules.description: GaussDB Oracle 兼容模式支持 VARCHAR2 类型

rules.name: NUMBER → NUMBER
rules.description: GaussDB 兼容 NUMBER 类型

rules.name: DATE(含时间) → TIMESTAMP
rules.description: Oracle DATE 包含时分秒，GaussDB 的 DATE 仅含日期，推荐使用 TIMESTAMP

rules.name: CLOB → CLOB
rules.description: GaussDB 支持 CLOB 类型

rules.name: CREATE OR REPLACE → CREATE OR REPLACE
rules.description: GaussDB 兼容 CREATE OR REPLACE 语法（Oracle 兼容模式）
rules.exampleSqlSource: CREATE OR REPLACE PROCEDURE p1 AS BEGIN NULL; END;
rules.exampleSqlTarget: CREATE OR REPLACE PROCEDURE p1 AS BEGIN NULL; END;

rules.name: PACKAGE → 拆分/SCHEMA
rules.description: GaussDB 不直接支持 Oracle PACKAGE（包），需拆分为独立的函数/存储过程，或使用 SCHEMA 组织
rules.exampleSqlSource: CREATE OR REPLACE PACKAGE pkg1 AS FUNCTION f1 RETURN NUMBER; END pkg1;
rules.exampleSqlTarget: CREATE OR REPLACE FUNCTION f1() RETURNS NUMERIC AS $$ BEGIN RETURN 1; END; $$ LANGUAGE plpgsql;

rules.name: AUTHID CURRENT_USER → SECURITY DEFINER/INVOKER
rules.description: Oracle AUTHID CURRENT_USER 对应 GaussDB SECURITY INVOKER，AUTHID DEFINER 对应 SECURITY DEFINER
rules.exampleSqlSource: CREATE OR REPLACE PROCEDURE p1 AUTHID CURRENT_USER AS BEGIN NULL; END;
rules.exampleSqlTarget: CREATE OR REPLACE PROCEDURE p1() SECURITY INVOKER AS $$ BEGIN NULL; END; $$ LANGUAGE plpgsql;

rules.name: EXCEPTION → EXCEPTION
rules.description: GaussDB 支持 PL/pgSQL 异常处理，但异常名不同（如 NO_DATA_FOUND → NO_DATA_FOUND）
rules.exampleSqlSource: EXCEPTION WHEN NO_DATA_FOUND THEN RETURN NULL;
rules.exampleSqlTarget: EXCEPTION WHEN NO_DATA_FOUND THEN RETURN NULL;

rules.name: TABLESPACE → TABLESPACE
rules.description: GaussDB 支持 TABLESPACE，但表空间管理方式不同于 Oracle
rules.exampleSqlSource: CREATE TABLE t (id INT) TABLESPACE users;
rules.exampleSqlTarget: CREATE TABLE t (id INT) TABLESPACE users;

rules.name: STORAGE → 移除
rules.description: Oracle STORAGE 存储参数 GaussDB 不支持，需移除

rules.name: SYNONYM → SYNONYM
rules.description: GaussDB Oracle 兼容模式支持同义词 SYNONYM
rules.exampleSqlSource: CREATE OR REPLACE SYNONYM syn1 FOR schema1.table1;
rules.exampleSqlTarget: CREATE OR REPLACE SYNONYM syn1 FOR schema1.table1;

rules.name: DBLINK → DBLINK/FDW
rules.description: Oracle DBLINK 需替换为 GaussDB 的 Foreign Data Wrapper (FDW)，语法和配置方式完全不同
rules.exampleSqlSource: CREATE DATABASE LINK remote CONNECT TO user IDENTIFIED BY pass USING 'tns';
rules.exampleSqlTarget: CREATE SERVER remote FOREIGN DATA WRAPPER postgres_fdw OPTIONS (host 'remote', dbname 'mydb');
